member.name: T:NodeRed.SDK.NodeTypeAttribute
P:NodeRed.SDK.NodeTypeAttribute.Type
member.summary: Unique type identifier for this node (e.g., "inject", "my-custom-node").

member.name: P:NodeRed.SDK.NodeTypeAttribute.DisplayName
member.summary: Display name shown in the palette and editor.

member.name: P:NodeRed.SDK.NodeTypeAttribute.Category
member.summary: Category in the palette (e.g., Common, Function, Network).

member.name: P:NodeRed.SDK.NodeTypeAttribute.Color
member.summary: Background color (hex, e.g., "#a6bbcf").

member.name: P:NodeRed.SDK.NodeTypeAttribute.Icon
member.summary: Font Awesome icon class (e.g., "fa fa-bug").

member.name: P:NodeRed.SDK.NodeTypeAttribute.Inputs
member.summary: Number of input ports (0 or 1).

member.name: P:NodeRed.SDK.NodeTypeAttribute.Outputs
member.summary: Number of output ports.

member.name: P:NodeRed.SDK.NodeTypeAttribute.HasButton
member.summary: Whether this node has an action button (like Inject).

member.name: T:NodeRed.SDK.NodePropertyAttribute
T:NodeRed.SDK.NodeCredentialAttribute
member.summary: Attribute to mark a property as a credential (stored securely, not exported).

member.name: T:NodeRed.SDK.NodeModuleAttribute
member.summary:
Attribute to define a node module (package of nodes). Apply this at the ASSEMBLY level to define a module containing multiple nodes.
This follows Node-RED's pattern where: - Core nodes are in @node-red/nodes package (one package, many nodes) - Contrib modules like node-red-dashboard contain multiple related nodes - Each module/assembly shares its dependencies
Example in AssemblyInfo.cs: [assembly: NodeModule("@myorg/node-red-contrib-mymodule", Version = "1.0.0", Description = "My custom dashboard nodes")]

member.name: P:NodeRed.SDK.NodeModuleAttribute.Name
member.summary: Module name (e.g., "@myorg/node-red-contrib-mymodule"). Following Node-RED naming conventions.

member.name: P:NodeRed.SDK.NodeModuleAttribute.Version
member.summary: Module version (semver format).

member.name: P:NodeRed.SDK.NodeModuleAttribute.Description
member.summary: Module description.

member.name: P:NodeRed.SDK.NodeModuleAttribute.Author
member.summary: Module author.

member.name: P:NodeRed.SDK.NodeModuleAttribute.MinVersion
member.summary: Minimum Node-RED .NET runtime version required. Similar to Node-RED's "node-red": { "version": ">=1.0.0" } in package.json.

member.name: T:NodeRed.SDK.Examples.ExampleUpperCaseNode
member.summary:
Example: Simple node that transforms the payload to uppercase.
This demonstrates the basic structure of a node: - NodeTypeAttribute defines metadata - DefineProperties() defines the editor UI - DefineHelp() provides documentation - OnInputAsync() handles messages

member.name: T:NodeRed.SDK.Examples.ExampleCounterNode
member.summary:
Example: Node with multiple configuration options.
This demonstrates: - Multiple property types (text, number, select, checkbox) - Conditional visibility with ShowWhen/HideWhen - Using configuration values

member.name: T:NodeRed.SDK.Examples.ExampleTimestampNode
member.summary:
Example: Node with a button (like Inject).
This demonstrates: - HasButton = true for nodes with action buttons - DefineButton() to configure the button - Triggering output without input

member.name: T:NodeRed.SDK.Examples.ExampleServerConfigNode
member.summary:
Example: Configuration node for shared settings.
This demonstrates: - IsConfigNode = true for config nodes - Config nodes don't appear in the flow, but are selected from dropdowns

member.name: T:NodeRed.SDK.Examples.ExampleMqttOutNode
member.summary:
Example: Node that uses a configuration node.
This demonstrates: - AddConfigNode() to reference a config node - Accessing the config node at runtime

member.name: T:NodeRed.SDK.HelpBuilder
M:NodeRed.SDK.HelpBuilder.Summary(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the short summary (shown as palette tooltip).

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.HelpBuilder.AddInput(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds an input property description.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.HelpBuilder.AddOutput(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds an output property description.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.HelpBuilder.Details(System.String)
member.summary: Sets detailed usage information.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.HelpBuilder.AddReference(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a reference link.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.HelpBuilder.Build
member.summary: Builds the help text object.

member.name: T:NodeRed.SDK.NodeBase
P:NodeRed.SDK.NodeBase.Config
member.summary: The node's runtime configuration.

member.name: P:NodeRed.SDK.NodeBase.Definition
member.summary: The node's type definition.

member.name: P:NodeRed.SDK.NodeBase.Id
member.summary: The node's unique ID.

member.name: P:NodeRed.SDK.NodeBase.Name
member.summary: The node's name (user-defined).

member.name: P:NodeRed.SDK.NodeBase.Flow
member.summary: Access to flow context storage.

member.name: P:NodeRed.SDK.NodeBase.Global
member.summary: Access to global context storage.

member.name: T:NodeRed.SDK.NodeBase.SendDelegate
member.summary: Delegate for sending messages to output ports.

member.name: T:NodeRed.SDK.NodeBase.DoneDelegate
member.summary: Delegate for signaling completion.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.NodeBase.InitializeAsync(NodeRed.Core.Entities.FlowNode,NodeRed.Core.Interfaces.INodeContext)
member.summary: Initializes the node. Override OnInitializeAsync for custom initialization.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.NodeBase.OnInputAsync(NodeRed.Core.Entities.NodeMessage,System.Int32)
member.summary: Called when the node receives an input message.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.NodeBase.CloseAsync
member.summary: Called when the node is being closed. Override OnCloseAsync for cleanup.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.NodeBase.OnInputAsync(NodeRed.Core.Entities.NodeMessage,NodeRed.SDK.NodeBase.SendDelegate,NodeRed.SDK.NodeBase.DoneDelegate)
member.summary: Override to handle incoming messages.
member.param: Delegate to send messages to output ports

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.NodeBase.OnInitializeAsync
member.summary: Override to perform custom initialization.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.NodeBase.OnCloseAsync
member.summary: Override to perform cleanup when the node is removed or flow is stopped.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.NodeBase.BuildDefinition
member.summary: Override to define the node's properties, help text, etc. Default implementation uses NodeTypeAttribute.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.NodeBase.DefineProperties
member.summary: Override to define the node's editable properties.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.NodeBase.DefineDefaults
member.summary: Override to define default values for properties.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.NodeBase.DefineHelp
member.summary: Override to define help text for the node.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.NodeBase.DefineButton
member.summary: Override to define button configuration for nodes with buttons.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.NodeBase.GetConfig``1(System.String,``0)
member.summary: Gets a configuration property value.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.NodeBase.NewMessage(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Creates a new message.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.NodeBase.CloneMessage(NodeRed.Core.Entities.NodeMessage)
member.summary: Clones an existing message.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.NodeBase.Status(System.String,NodeRed.SDK.StatusFill,NodeRed.SDK.SdkStatusShape)
member.summary: Sets the node's status display.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.NodeBase.ClearStatus
member.summary: Clears the node's status display.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.NodeBase.Log(System.String)
member.summary: Logs an info message.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.NodeBase.Warn(System.String)
member.summary: Logs a warning message.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.NodeBase.Error(System.String,NodeRed.Core.Entities.NodeMessage)
member.summary: Logs an error message.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.NodeBase.Debug(System.String)
member.summary: Logs a debug message.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.NodeBase.Trace(System.String)
member.summary: Logs a trace message.

member.name: T:NodeRed.SDK.StatusFill
member.summary: Status fill colors (SDK wrapper for Core.Enums.StatusColor).

member.name: T:NodeRed.SDK.SdkStatusShape
member.summary: Status indicator shapes (SDK wrapper for Core.Enums.StatusShape).

member.name: T:NodeRed.SDK.ContextScope
member.summary: Context scope for storage.

member.name: T:NodeRed.SDK.IContextAccessor
member.summary: Interface for accessing context storage.

member.name: T:NodeRed.SDK.INodeLoader
member.summary:
Service for discovering and loading node types from assemblies. Supports loading nodes from: - The main application assembly - Referenced assemblies - External plugin DLLs in a nodes directory
Similar to Node-RED's registry/loader.js, this handles: - Module discovery and loading - Version compatibility checking - Allow/deny list filtering

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.INodeLoader.DiscoverNodes(System.Reflection.Assembly[])
member.summary: Discovers all node types from the specified assemblies.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.INodeLoader.LoadFromDirectory(System.String)
member.summary: Loads nodes from a plugins directory.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.INodeLoader.CreateNode(System.String)
member.summary: Creates an instance of a node by type name.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.INodeLoader.GetNodeDefinitions
member.summary: Gets all registered node definitions.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.INodeLoader.SetAllowList(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Configures the allow list for module loading. Similar to Node-RED's externalModules.palette.allowList.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.INodeLoader.SetDenyList(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Configures the deny list for module loading. Similar to Node-RED's externalModules.palette.denyList.

member.name: T:NodeRed.SDK.NodeTypeInfo
member.summary: Information about a discovered node type.

member.name: P:NodeRed.SDK.NodeTypeInfo.TypeName
member.summary: The node type identifier.

member.name: P:NodeRed.SDK.NodeTypeInfo.ImplementationType
member.summary: The .NET type that implements the node.

member.name: P:NodeRed.SDK.NodeTypeInfo.Definition
member.summary: The node's definition.

member.name: P:NodeRed.SDK.NodeTypeInfo.Module
member.summary: The module this node belongs to (null for built-in nodes).

member.name: T:NodeRed.SDK.NodeModuleInfo
member.summary: Information about a node module (package).

member.name: T:NodeRed.SDK.NodeLoader
member.summary: Default implementation of node loader. Similar to Node-RED's registry system, handles: - Node discovery from assemblies - Plugin loading with dependency isolation - Allow/deny list filtering (like Node-RED's externalModules.palette) - Version compatibility checking

member.name: P:NodeRed.SDK.NodeLoader.RuntimeVersion
member.summary: The current runtime version for compatibility checking.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.NodeLoader.SetAllowList(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Configures the allow list for module loading. Similar to Node-RED's externalModules.palette.allowList. Patterns support wildcards: * matches any characters. Use ["*"] to allow all modules.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.NodeLoader.SetDenyList(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Configures the deny list for module loading. Similar to Node-RED's externalModules.palette.denyList. Patterns support wildcards: * matches any characters.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.NodeLoader.DiscoverNodes(System.Reflection.Assembly[])
member.summary: Discovers all node types from the specified assemblies. Similar to Node-RED's loadModuleFiles function.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.NodeLoader.LoadFromDirectory(System.String)
member.summary: Loads nodes from a plugins directory. Each plugin can optionally include a plugin.json manifest.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.NodeLoader.GetLoadErrors
member.summary: Gets any errors that occurred during plugin loading.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.NodeLoader.GetManifests
member.summary: Gets loaded plugin manifests.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.NodeLoader.CreateNode(System.String)
member.summary: Creates an instance of a node by type name.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.NodeLoader.GetNodeDefinitions
member.summary: Gets all registered node definitions.

member.name: T:NodeRed.SDK.PluginLoadContext
member.summary: Custom assembly load context for plugin isolation. Handles dependency version conflicts by: 1. Sharing SDK and Core assemblies with the host application 2. Loading plugin-specific dependencies in isolation 3. Falling back to host assemblies for shared dependencies

member.name: F:NodeRed.SDK.PluginLoadContext.SharedAssemblies
member.summary: Assemblies that should be shared with the host (not loaded per-plugin). This prevents version conflicts for core framework types.

member.name: T:NodeRed.SDK.PluginManifest
member.summary: Plugin manifest for declaring dependencies and compatibility.

member.name: T:NodeRed.SDK.PluginDependency
member.summary: Dependency declaration for a plugin.

member.name: T:NodeRed.SDK.PropertyBuilder
M:NodeRed.SDK.PropertyBuilder.AddText(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a text input property.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.PropertyBuilder.AddNumber(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Nullable{System.Double},System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a number input property.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.PropertyBuilder.AddSelect(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.String}},System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a select/dropdown property.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.PropertyBuilder.AddCheckbox(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a checkbox property.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.PropertyBuilder.AddTextArea(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a textarea property.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.PropertyBuilder.AddCode(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a code editor property.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.PropertyBuilder.AddTypedInput(System.String,System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.ValueTuple{System.String,System.String}},System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a TypedInput property (like Node-RED's TypedInput widget).

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.PropertyBuilder.AddInfo(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a static info text (not editable).

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.PropertyBuilder.AddConfigNode(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Adds a config node reference property.

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.PropertyBuilder.AddPassword(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a password input property (masked input for credentials).

member.name: M:NodeRed.SDK.PropertyBuilder.Build
member.summary: Builds the list of property definitions.
